author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for MCP tools subsystem (MCPTool, McpAuth, List/ReadMcpResource + services/mcp). Goal is to update the issue body with a markdown spec by reading Claude Code TS source (~3348-line client.ts, ~1578-line config.ts, ~1141-line useManageMCPConnections.ts). Not addressable in this cleanup session: the deliverable is external-source research, not Rust code, and the CC source is not accessible to this agent in scope. Phase 2 implementations are tracked separately (#613 elicitation, #616 XAA/IdP OAuth, #619 channel permissions, #622 in-process transport, #630 SSE/WS transports, #631 Streamable HTTP compliance, #663 /mcp UI). The MCP spec work is owner-level external research.
